description: Parse user query to extract triangle base, height, and unit parameters for function call generation

inputs.name: query_text
inputs.description: The raw user query containing triangle dimensions and unit information to be parsed

inputs.name: function_schema
inputs.description: The JSON schema string defining the available triangle calculation function and its parameters

output.description: Returns a function call JSON object with the function name as key and parameters nested: {"calculate_triangle_area": {"base": 10, "height": 5, "unit": "units"}}

fields.calculate_triangle_area: dict containing base (int), height (int), and unit (str) parameters

workflow_spec.name: Triangle Area Function Call Generator
workflow_spec.description: Parses user queries to extract triangle parameters and generates function calls to calculate triangle area
